# Quick Fix: NudgeService rewrite + firebase_service.dart deletion
Generated: 2026-04-02T22:56:41

## Changes Made

### 1. `lib/services/notification_service.dart` — full rewrite
- Renamed class to `NudgeService` with `NudgeService.instance` singleton
- Added `checkAndNudge(String appName, int minutesUsed)` with 3 thresholds:
  - 30 min: "Mola ver! 🧘"
  - 60 min: "Telefonunu birak! 📵"
  - 90 min: "O2 puanlarin eriyor... 🫧"
- Per-app deduplication via `_lastNudge` map (no repeat nudges for same threshold)
- Added `sendDailyReminder()` and `sendWeeklyReport()`
- `flutter_local_notifications` not in pubspec — `_send()` falls back to `debugPrint`
- TODOs marked for when plugin is added
- All old methods preserved for backward compatibility
- `typedef NotificationService = NudgeService` alias for zero-breakage
- Uses no `withOpacity` — no Color opacity needed in this file

### 2. `lib/services/firebase_service.dart` — DELETED
- Was a 3-line comment-only stub
- No files imported it (grep confirmed zero matches)

## Verification
- firebase_service imports: 0 files affected
- Syntax: No compile errors expected (pure Dart, no new deps)

## Files Modified
1. `lib/services/notification_service.dart` — rewritten as NudgeService
2. `lib/services/firebase_service.dart` — deleted

## Notes
